_note: PLACEHOLDER guest reviews — replace with real ones as they come in.

items.name: Sophie & Mark
items.text: A wonderful stay. The terrace sea view was even better than the photos, and the beach was an easy walk away. Spotless, well equipped, and the local tips left in the apartment were spot on.

items.name: Familie Becker
items.text: Perfect for our family of four. The kids loved being a minute from the sand and we loved how close everything was — restaurants, the marina, and the old town. We would happily come back.

items.name: Lucia
items.text: Bright, comfortable apartment in a great location. Easy check-in and very responsive host. The recommendations page helped us find some fantastic little tapas spots.
